# akeyless_gateway_migration (Resource)

Gateway Migration resource



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `hosts` (String) A comma separated list of IPs, CIDR ranges, or DNS names to scan
- `name` (String) Migration name
- `si_target_name` (String) SSH, Windows or Linked Target Name (Relevant only for Server Inventory migration)
- `si_users_path_template` (String) Path location template for migrating users as Rotated Secrets (Relevant only for Server Inventory migration)
- `target_location` (String) Target location in Akeyless for imported secrets

### Optional

- `aws_key` (String, Sensitive) AWS Secret Access Key (relevant only for AWS migration)
- `aws_key_id` (String) AWS Access Key ID (relevant only for AWS migration)
- `aws_region` (String) AWS region (relevant only for AWS migration)
- `azure_client_id` (String) Azure Key Vault Access client ID (relevant only for Azure Key Vault migration)
- `azure_kv_name` (String) Azure Key Vault name (relevant only for Azure Key Vault migration)
- `azure_secret` (String, Sensitive) Azure Key Vault secret (relevant only for Azure Key Vault migration)
- `azure_tenant_id` (String) Azure Key Vault Access tenant ID (relevant only for Azure Key Vault migration)
- `gcp_key` (String, Sensitive) Base64-encoded GCP Service Account private key text (relevant only for GCP migration)
- `json` (Boolean) Set output format to JSON
- `k8s_namespace` (String) K8s namespace (relevant only for K8s migration)
- `k8s_password` (String, Sensitive) K8s Client password (relevant only for K8s migration with Password Authentication method)
- `k8s_skip_system` (Boolean) K8s skip system secrets (relevant only for K8s migration)
- `k8s_token` (String, Sensitive) K8s Bearer Token (relevant only for K8s migration with Token Authentication method)
- `k8s_url` (String) K8s API server URL (relevant only for K8s migration)
- `k8s_username` (String) K8s Client username (relevant only for K8s migration with Password Authentication method)
- `protection_key` (String) The name of a key that used to encrypt the secret value (if empty, the account default protectionKey key will be used)
- `type` (String) Migration type (hashi/aws/gcp/k8s/azure_kv/active_directory/server_inventory/certificate)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
